SEARCH
Package com.dua3.utility.swing

Class TextEditorPane

java.lang.Object
java.awt.Component
java.awt.Container
javax.swing.JComponent
javax.swing.JScrollPane
com.dua3.utility.swing.TextPane
com.dua3.utility.swing.TextEditorPane
All Implemented Interfaces:
RichTextEditorPane, RichTextPane, ImageObserver, MenuContainer, Serializable, Accessible, ScrollPaneConstants
public class TextEditorPane extends TextPane implements RichTextEditorPane
Swing rich-text editor pane backed by a shared RichTextEditorModel.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Constructor Details

    • TextEditorPane

      public TextEditorPane()
      Creates an empty editor pane.

    • TextEditorPane

      public TextEditorPane(@Nullable CharSequence text)
      Creates an editor pane with initial text.
      Parameters:
      text - initial text

  • Method Details

    • getToolbarLocation

      public DetachableNode.Location getToolbarLocation()
      Retrieves the current location of the toolbar.
      Returns:
      the location of the toolbar as a DetachableNode.Location object

    • setToolbarLocation

      public void setToolbarLocation(DetachableNode.Location value)
      Sets the location of the toolbar to the specified value. The method updates the toolbar position and triggers necessary actions such as applying the new location and notifying listeners of the change in property.
      Parameters:
      value - the new location for the toolbar. It must be an instance of DetachableNode.Location.

    • getToolbarApplicationParent

      public @Nullable Container getToolbarApplicationParent()
      Retrieves the parent container for the toolbar application, if available.
      Returns:
      the parent container for the toolbar application, or null if no parent container is set.

    • setToolbarApplicationParent

      public void setToolbarApplicationParent(@Nullable Container value)
      Sets the parent container for the toolbar application.
      Parameters:
      value - the container to set as the toolbar application parent. Can be null to remove the current parent.

    • getDocumentText

      public RichText getDocumentText()
      Returns the current document text.
      Returns:
      current document text

    • getDocumentVersion

      public long getDocumentVersion()
      Returns current document version.
      Returns:
      document version, incremented on each document mutation

      Indicates whether this pane supports editing.

      isEditable in class TextPane
      Returns:

      public void setEditable(boolean value)
      Enables or disables editing.

    • setEnterKeyInsertsNewline

      public void setEnterKeyInsertsNewline(boolean value)
      Description copied from interface: RichTextEditorPane
      Configures ENTER key behavior.
      Specified by:
      setEnterKeyInsertsNewline in interface RichTextEditorPane
      Parameters:
      value - true if ENTER should insert a newline, false to leave ENTER handling to outer controls
